title: Backorder handling on partial picking validation
reuse_advice: Validating a picking with done<demand already triggers the native stock.backorder.confirmation flow. Don't re-implement split/backorder creation by hand.
when_not_enough: a custom partial-fulfillment policy the standard dialog can't express

title: Correct done/processed-quantity fields on stock.move.line (v17 rename)
reuse_advice: In Odoo 17+ use stock.move.line.quantity + picked (boolean); the old qty_done / product_uom_qty are GONE. Confirm field names via `odoo-ai brief stock.move.line` before any move-line code.
when_not_enough: nothing — always use the native fields; never re-add qty_done

title: Multi-step delivery / receipt via routes & rules (config, not code)
reuse_advice: Model multi-step flows and procurement as stock.route + stock.rule CONFIG (data), not hand-coded extra stock.move records. Enable routes in Inventory settings.
when_not_enough: a routing decision that depends on runtime data no rule domain can express

title: Set values on / control how moves group into an auto-created picking
reuse_advice: Override stock.move._get_new_picking_values to set header values on the auto-created picking; don't write() after the fact (the move may merge first).
when_not_enough: picking creation logic outside the standard assignation path

title: React when a transfer is validated/done
reuse_advice: Extend stock.move._action_done (call super()) to react after a move completes; don't hook the button_validate shell. Note backorders can run it again.
when_not_enough: logic that must run exactly once across backorders (then guard on context/state)
